title: Compatible Healthbars
description: Yet another TH pack, pre-alpha but atleast it's compatible with any mob texture while also being easier to use to make an addon and having a few advantages over regular TH.
body:
# THIS PACK IS NO LONGER BEING SUPPORTED, IT WAS EMBEDDED IN [TH](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/torturable-healthbars) AND [TH+FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/thfa)
________________________________________________________________________________________________
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/634c8db2e3b3a0cb6f034050c5cdd603bc6e7f4d.png)

### This Pack is available on:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ab3456165673272dd7f0cb63cd9c89027851386.png)[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41e395696a03242fed3b48f9f9f98fbf58e7c73a.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/compatible-healthbars)[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/334a7e0428a8bdb63a20d7c083023be133f47059.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/compatible-healthbars/)![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f494a6ffd5a324f8b89deb49b4d85b8e35415b66.png)

# ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5456c44ba0dd5043409848a85b6a2d681f4fedb9.png)Last update
Lets just imagine all the chaos that happened until now was just a dream, because the pack is now playable! Yeah in 0.3 (2.2 for TH) you could not open the game with any of the TH/CH resourcepacks on. That and many other optifine related bugs have been fixed. Also to stay coherent with what has been added to 2.3 of Torturable Healthbars, magmacubes have been added and spiders now have an updated model! Also some mobs have been modified too, here's the changelog:
- Fixed a toooooon of bugs, mainly models not appearing when using optifine
- Modified the spider and cave spider model and texture
- Updated the magmacube to have a decent texture
- Remade ghast model to be animated when dying
- Remade creaking and stray, that didn't work with optifine

# Description
Finally, you'll now be able to experience the blood of the healthbars on top of your favorite mob reskins! This includes basically any texture pack (not resource packs, does not support optifine models) and even things like Programmer art of 32x or above texture packs

This pack still has only about 23 mobs ready. This pack will be updated in the next months, but at a really slow pace because i have other things to do.

## NO I WONT MAKE CH COMPATIBLE WITH FRESH ANIMATIONS
maybe...

If you were searching for the original [TH](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/torturable-healthbars)
 or the [FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/thfa) version, here they are
